entries.reason: SPAWN creates an isolated child-runtime handle; its observation contract is modeled, but the quarantined runtime-control API is not Core-portable yet.
AWAIT projects a child handle to the observed [status result-stack] tuple under the child-runtime observation contract.
STATUS observes the current child-runtime state as text without awaiting completion; it remains in the quarantined runtime-control family.
KILL transitions a child handle into the killed state under the modeled runtime-control contract.
MONITOR registers observation of a child handle while preserving the handle-shaped observation surface; the API remains exploratory/quarantined.
SUPERVISE runs a child group under a one-for-one restart policy, producing a supervisor handle over the supervised children; the API remains exploratory/quarantined.

entries.reason: Builds an explicit sequential music group from an indexed sequence of child music values.
Builds an explicit simultaneous music group from an indexed sequence of child music values.
Builds a simultaneous chord group from an indexed sequence of pitch/duration values.
Wraps a positive exact scalar frequency into an explicit music.pitch record.
Wraps a positive exact scalar duration into an explicit music.duration record.
Combines a music.pitch and music.duration record into a music.note record.
Builds a music.rest record from a music.duration record.
Builds an equal-division-of-octave tuning record from reference frequency and division count.
Builds an equal-division-of-ratio tuning record from reference frequency, equave ratio, and division count.
Resolves a step index within a tuning record into a derived music.pitch record.
Tags a music group with the role of a single melodic voice.
Tags a music group with the role of an instrument track.
Tags a music group with the role of a measure/bar.
Tags a music group with the role of a phrase.
Builds a scoped music value that interprets bare integer body values through the supplied tuning at PLAY time.
Validates an ADSR envelope vector for a music target; treated as experimental music-structure annotation until the audio algebra is canonicalized.
Annotates or validates a vector target for sine waveform playback; experimental music-structure sugar, not Core.
Annotates or validates a vector target for square waveform playback; experimental music-structure sugar, not Core.
Annotates or validates a vector target for sawtooth waveform playback; experimental music-structure sugar, not Core.
Annotates or validates a vector target for triangle waveform playback; experimental music-structure sugar, not Core.
